mapper.select: SELECT A.INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId ,A.SR_TYPE_CD AS srTypeCd ,A.SR_SEQ AS srSeq ,A.SYS_CD AS sysCd ,B.SYS_NM AS sysNm ,A.TRX_CD AS trxCd ,A.FILE_PATH AS filePath ,A.CRG_MAN_NM AS crgManNm FROM TBINTRFCSRSYSDT A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBSRSYSBS B on A.SYS_CD = B.SYS_CD WHERE INTRFC_ID = #{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR} order by A.SR_TYPE_CD desc
mapper.update: DELETE FROM TBINTRFCSRSYSDT WHERE INTRFC_ID = #{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
